analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒較為緊張，受中國DeepSeek事件影響，AI相關股票大幅下跌，Nvidia股價下跌16%。倫敦金、銀結算下跌，倫敦金價下跌1.4%，倫敦銀價下跌2.5%。美國能源監管機構要求重整數據中心電網規則，以確保數據中心的電力供應穩定和可靠。美國與伊朗關於霍爾木茲海峽關閉爭議，美國官員否認伊朗的主張。

【結語】
投資者應該保持冷靜和謹慎，避免被市場情緒影響。投資者應該仔細評估每個股票的基本面和風險，做出明智的投資決定。投資者也應該注意到市場的波動和風險，保持投資組合的多樣化和穩定。

【精選個股】
NVDA - NVIDIA - AI基礎設施相關股票大幅下跌，但公司仍有強大的競爭力和未來發展潛力。
BK Technologies - BK Technologies - 利潤率表現良好，但公司仍需在 2027 年交出實質成績，展現其業務的持續成長和競爭力。
Plexus - Plexus - 透過戰略轉變取得了成功，但市場已經對這個轉變做出了充分的反應，現在它的股價已經被套牢。
BK Technologies - BK Technologies - 利潤率表現良好，但公司仍需在 2027 年交出實質成績，展現其業務的持續成長和競爭力。
BK Technologies - BK Technologies - 利潤率表現良好，但公司仍需在 2027 年交出實質成績，展現其業務的持續成長和競爭力。

風險提醒：投資者應該注意到市場的波動和風險，保持投資組合的多樣化和穩定。

items.title: Where Will Micron Technology Be in 5 Years?
items.summary: A closer look at the memory market's prospects over the next five years suggests that Micron Technology still has multibagger potential.
items.zh_title: 五年後 Micron Technology 的前景會如何？
items.zh_point: 根據記憶體市場的前景預測，Micron Technology 在未來五年內仍有很大的增長潛力。

items.title: Mark Cuban Warns 6 Popular Investments Could Quietly Ruin Your Wealth
items.summary: Mark Cuban built a fortune Forbes pegged at $6 billion on its 2025 Forbes 400 list by being more careful about what he refused to fund than what he chased. His framework, surfaced again this month in a widely shared rundown of his investing rules, argues that staying wealthy is mostly about pattern recognition on ... Mark Cuban Warns 6 Popular Investments Could Quietly Ruin Your Wealth
items.zh_title: 馬克·古班警告：6個熱門投資可能悄悄毀了你的財富
items.zh_point: 馬克·古班在2025年福布斯400富豪榜中被評估為6億美元的財富，主要是因為他對投資的謹慎態度。根據他的投資原則，他認為保持財富主要是通過識別投資模式來實現的。

items.title: This Top AI Cryptocurrency Was Up 115% in May. But Is It a Buy?
items.summary: NEAR Protocol surged 115% in May on its AI agent infrastructure play. Is this the real deal, or just another empty hype cycle?
items.zh_title: 這個頂級AI加密貨幣在五月上漲了115%。但它是否值得買入？
items.zh_point: NEAR Protocol在五月上漲了115%，是因為它的AI代理基礎設施玩法。這是否是真正的機會，還是只是另一個空洞的熱潮？

items.title: Where Will Alphabet Stock Be in 5 Years?
items.summary: This leading artificial intelligence (AI) enterprise has more than doubled shareholder capital in the past five years.
items.zh_title: 五年內 Alphabet 股價會如何走勢？
items.zh_point: Alphabet 這家領先的人工智慧企業，在過去五年內股東資本翻倍以上。

items.title: Elon Musk Nears 20% Voting Power In Tesla After Exercising Stock Options
items.summary: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk gained more than 300 million shares of the EV giant’s stock as part of his 2018 CEO Compensation Award, which takes his voting rights in Tesla to approximately 19.9%. Elon Musk Gains Tesla Shares In a Form 4 filing with the SEC on June 16, Musk exercised his stock options as part of the 2018 CEO award, gaining over 303,960,630 shares of the EV giant at $23.34/share. The original agreement granted Musk 20,264,042 shares at $350.02/share, but Tesla’s stock split 5-for-1 in
items.zh_title: 埃隆·馬斯克接近Tesla 20% 的投票權力
items.zh_point: 埃隆·馬斯克通過行使2018年CEO薪酬獎項，獲得超過30億股Tesla股票，將其在Tesla的投票權力提高到約19.9%。

items.title: Iran reportedly closes Strait of Hormuz again as Vance heads to Switzerland for talks
items.summary: Iran's joint military command said the closure was in response to continued Israeli military operations in Lebanon.
items.zh_title: 伊朗 reportedly 將霍爾木茲海峽再次封鎖  瓦恩斯前往瑞士進行談判
items.zh_point: 伊朗軍方表示，霍爾木茲海峽封鎖是對黎巴嫩以色列軍事行動的回應。

items.title: Report says UK PM Starmer ready to quit, but source says he is still focused on the job
items.summary: The Observer report said Starmer was discussing the matter with his wife at his Chequers country residence before making a final decision.
items.zh_title: 英國首相史達瑪爾準備辭職，但消息來源否認
items.zh_point: 英國首相史達瑪爾被傳準備辭職，但他的辦公室否認這一消息，指他仍然專心於工作。

items.title: Massive fire destroys resort in Dominican Republic and forces evacuation of almost 1,700 tourists
items.summary: The fire forced the evacuation of nearly 1,700 tourists and caused the death of an Italian national, authorities said.
items.zh_title: 多明尼加共和國度假村大火燒毀，逼近1,700名遊客撤離
items.zh_point: 多明尼加共和國一處度假村因大火燒毀，導致逼近1,700名遊客撤離，並造成一名意大利籍國民死亡。

items.title: Trump tries to blame Reflecting Pool woes on vandalism, without offering substantiation
items.summary: The paint is peeling from Washington's Reflecting Pool after the renovation ordered by President Donald Trump.
items.zh_title: 川普試圖將反映池問題歸咎於破壞，卻未提供證據
items.zh_point: 川普總統下令翻新後，華盛頓的反映池出現油漆剝落問題，川普試圖將責任推給破壞者，但未提供任何證據。

items.title: 'Fun dads' get 5 things right about parenting that many people forget—'they're worth borrowing' this Father's Day, says expert
items.summary: Many parents spend their days managing schedules, chores and responsibilities. This Father's Day, a parenting expert shares five "fun dad" habits that can increase joy and strengthen parent-child relationships.
items.zh_title: 「歡樂爸爸」五個妙招，讓你在父親節更享受父子關係
items.zh_point: 一位育兒專家分享五個「歡樂爸爸」的習慣，能夠增加父母與子女之間的樂趣和親密關係。

items.title: ‘Money can make you happy’: My wife and I have no heirs, but we’re making the world a better place by giving it away
items.summary: “If you find a need in your community, there’s likely an organization that will help you get involved.”
items.zh_title: 金錢能讓你快樂：我和妻子沒有後代，但我們透過捐款讓世界變得更好
items.zh_point: 一對夫婦決定將財富捐出，透過捐款讓社會變得更美好，同時也分享了關於如何參與社區公益活動的建議。

items.title: Scared to spend your retirement money? Here’s one way to get over the fear of running out.
items.summary: This fear is probably going to cause you some regrets.
items.zh_title: 害怕用完退休金？這樣可以克服恐懼
items.zh_point: 害怕用完退休金可能會讓你在未來感到後悔。退休後的生活經濟壓力可能會讓你感到恐懼，但有一個方法可以幫助你克服這種恐懼。

items.title: You’re going to pay tax on RMDs — there’s no way around it. Or is there?
items.summary: Here’s your new playbook to protect your retirement cash.
items.zh_title: 你必須繳稅的退休金，沒有逃避的方法。或許有個辦法？
items.zh_point: 了解退休金稅的規則，才能有效保護你的退休資金。

items.title: Social Security is looking at a $500-a-month cut. Could a new bipartisan commission make a difference?
items.summary: A new legislative proposal would create a bipartisan commission to strengthen the finances of Social Security and Medicare at a time when the programs are under pressure.
items.zh_title: 社保面臨每月500美元的削減，新跨黨派委員會能否改善局勢？
items.zh_point: 美國國會新提案建議成立跨黨派委員會，以強化社保和醫療保險的財政狀況，同時面臨著這些計劃的壓力。

items.title: Inside the push to weaken Washington’s toughest financial watchdog
items.summary: The SEC used to intimidate corporate wrongdoers. Now its own commissioners are gutting its leverage.
items.zh_title: 華盛頓最嚴厲的財經監管機構面臨削弱
items.zh_point: 美國證券交易委員會（SEC）曾經以嚴厲態度懲罰企業違規行為，但現在委員會內部的委員正試圖削弱其影響力。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: AI相關股票大幅下跌，中國DeepSeek事件觸發全球市場恐慌
items.zh_point: 美國股市大幅下跌，納斯達克指數領跌，AI基礎設施相關股票大幅下跌，Nvidia股價下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 倫敦金、銀結算下跌
items.zh_point: 倫敦金價下跌1.4%，連續兩天下跌；倫敦銀價下跌2.5%，連續三天下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國新興企業宣稱已經培養出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，並不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: DeepSeek 不會讓美國 AI 巨頭沉沒
items.zh_point: 對於 Nvidia、Broadcom 等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒過度膨脹。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與電信業績報導：市場話題
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等科技、媒體和電信業績最新動態。

items.title: Plexus: A Flawless Strategic Pivot, But Priced In
items.zh_title: Plexus：完美的戰略轉變，但已被市場套牢
items.zh_point: Plexus 這家公司通過戰略轉變取得了成功，但市場已經對這個轉變做出了充分的反應，現在它的股價已經被套牢。

items.title: U.S. energy regulator orders overhaul of data center grid rules
items.zh_title: 美國能源監管機構要求重整數據中心電網規則
items.zh_point: 美國能源監管機構要求重整數據中心電網規則，以確保數據中心的電力供應穩定和可靠。

items.title: Construction Partners: The Road Ahead Still Looks Promising
items.zh_title: 建設夥伴：道路前景仍看好
items.zh_point: 建設夥伴公司的股價表現良好，公司的道路建設業務持續擴展，預計未來仍有許多有利的機會。

items.title: BK Technologies: Strong Margins, But 2027 Has To Deliver
items.zh_title: BK Technologies: 強勁利潤，但2027必須交出成績單
items.zh_point: BK Technologies 的利潤率表現良好，但公司仍需在 2027 年交出實質成績，展現其業務的持續成長和競爭力。

items.title: Eightco Holdings: A Tiny Public Backdoor To OpenAI, But Dilution Is The Catch
items.zh_title: Eightco Holdings：一家小型公開背書公司的入口點，卻有稀釋風險
items.zh_point: Eightco Holdings 是一家小型公開背書公司，似乎與 OpenAI 有關聯，但投資人需要注意到稀釋股權的風險。

items.title: Trump, Italy’s Meloni exchange fresh criticism over Iran war stance
items.zh_title: 特朗普與義大利的梅洛尼互換新批評，關於伊朗戰爭立場
items.zh_point: 美國前總統特朗普與義大利總理梅洛尼因伊朗戰爭立場發生意見分歧，兩人互換批評。

items.title: Trump, blaming alleged vandals, says Washington Reflecting Pool needs repairs
items.zh_title: 川普稱華盛頓反射池需修繕，指責疑似破壞者
items.zh_point: 川普總統指責有人破壞華盛頓反射池，稱該池需要進行修繕。

items.title: U.S.-Iran ceasefire talks set to begin in Switzerland as Vance arrives
items.zh_title: 美國伊朗停火談判將在瑞士展開
items.zh_point: 美國和伊朗即將在瑞士展開停火談判，雙方將就和平協議進行磋商。

items.title: Zelenskiy warns of major Russian attack as strikes kill at least six
items.zh_title: 澤連斯基警告俄羅斯將發動大規模攻擊　至少六人喪生
items.zh_point: 烏克蘭總統澤連斯基警告俄羅斯可能發動大規模攻擊，同時俄羅斯轟炸造成至少六人喪生。

items.title: US disputes Iranian claims about closing Strait of Hormuz as negotiators head to Switzerland
items.zh_title: 美國與伊朗關於霍爾木茲海峽關閉爭議 美國官員否認伊朗的主張
items.zh_point: 美國官員否認伊朗的主張，霍爾木茲海峽關閉可能對全球油價造成重大影響，美國與伊朗正在進行談判，將前往瑞士會面。
